name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A small thank-you from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We saw you cancelled recently, and I wanted to reach out personally — no pressure, no guilt trip. Life gets busy, and we'd rather you come back when the timing feels right than feel nagged in the meantime.

If (or when) you're ready, here's 20% off your next visit with us:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days and works on cleanings or any follow-up care. Our goal has always been to make dental visits feel a little less scary and a lot more comfortable — painless cleanings, modern tech, and a team that actually listens.

And if something about your last experience didn't sit right, I'd genuinely like to hear about it. Just hit reply — it comes straight to us.

Take care either way,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a friendly heads-up that your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in a few days. Use it whenever you're ready, no pressure either way :)

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
